name: Pizza Bianca (Simple Crispy Pizza)
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out each round of pizza dough on a lightly floured board using a rolling pin until it forms a 12-inch circle, with thickness between 1/8 inch and 1/4 inch.
2. Turn the dough over as you roll to prevent shrinkage.
3. Place each piece on an oiled baking sheet or pizza pan.
4. Dimple the dough and brush with olive oil.
5. Sprinkle with salt, garlic, and rosemary.
6. Preheat oven to 425°F.
7. Bake until the crusts are golden and crispy, about 20 to 25 minutes.
